label: The Index Lantern
description: The Index Lantern serves as a licensed tavern set into Continuum Anchorage’s ring of black composite and radiant conductor-ribs. Its vaulted interior carries transit indices as inlay along the walls and ceiling, converting navigational notation into permanent ornament. Seating bays are partitioned by pressure-rated bulkheads and acoustic baffles, while a central service bar of polished conductor-metal reflects the station’s fixed fields of darkness and radiance. Lighting remains steady under engineered time and inertia gradients, producing a controlled, unvarying gloom suited to interstitial layovers.
